meta.educational_goal: To visualize the properties and operations of a Red-Black Tree.

states.label: Node Inserted
evidence: insertBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { const value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 30) + 1; tree.insert(value); });

states.label: Tree Reset
evidence: resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { tree.root = null; initialValues.forEach(val => { tree.insert(val); }); });

events.description: Inserts a random node into the Red-Black Tree.
evidence: insertBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { const value = Math.floor(Math.random() * 30) + 1; tree.insert(value); });

events.description: Resets the Red-Black Tree to its initial state.
evidence: resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { tree.root = null; initialValues.forEach(val => { tree.insert(val); }); });

expected_observables: Tree is reset to initial values.
evidence: resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { tree.root = null; initialValues.forEach(val => { tree.insert(val); }); });
